text.title: AWS Serverless API (Lambda + API Gateway + DynamoDB + EventBridge) Decision Tree
text.summary: Routing tree mapping observable signals on the input to a rule from 01-core-rules.xml. Use when the right path is ambiguous.

decision-tree.root-question: Does the handler complete in < 15 min AND state can live outside the process?

conclusion.verdict: API GW HTTP API + Lambda arm64 + DDB single-table

text.example: serverless_fit=true → pattern=sync_api → API GW HTTP API + Lambda arm64. References rule http-api-not-rest.
